2605.18673.title: Generative AI Advertising as a Problem of Trustworthy Commercial Intervention
2605.18673.paper_summary: Major deployed generative AI advertising systems preserve a visible boundary between commercial content and AI-generated responses. Yet empirical research shows that ads woven directly into large language model (LLM) outputs often go undetected by users. We argue that generative AI fundamentally changes advertising: rather than placing products into discrete slots, it enables interventions on the generative process itself, which induce commercial influence through less observable channels. This reframes generative AI advertising as a problem of trustworthy intervention rather than content placement. We introduce a taxonomy organized by influence tier, corresponding to interventions on progressively more latent variables: product mentions, information framing, behavioral redirection, and long-term preference shaping; and show how these tiers instantiate across modalities and system architectures, including retrieval-augmented generation and agentic pipelines where upstream decisions can sharply constrain downstream outcomes. Both major deployed systems and designed mechanisms concentrate on the most observable and easiest-to-govern tier, while the forms of commercial influence most consequential for user autonomy remain poorly understood and lack frameworks for detection, measurement, or disclosure. The central challenge is whether commercial influence in generative systems can be made trustworthy, i.e., attributable, measurable, contestable, and aligned with user welfare.
2605.18673.paper_summary_zh: 主要部署的生成式 AI 廣告系統在商業內容與 AI 生成的回應之間保留了明顯的界限。 然而實證研究顯示，直接融入大型語言模型 (LLM) 輸出的廣告經常被用戶忽視。 我們認為生成式 AI 從根本上改變了廣告：它不再將產品放置在離散的槽位中，而是使對生成過程本身的干預成為可能，這些干預通過不那麼明顯的渠道引入商業影響。 這將生成式 AI 廣告重新框架為一個值得信賴的干預問題，而非內容放置問題。 我們引入了一個按影響層級組織的分類法，對應於對逐漸更隱性變量的干預：產品提及、信息框架、行為重定向和長期偏好塑造；並展示這些層級如何在不同模式和系統架構中體現，包括檢索增強生成和代理管道，其中上游決策可以嚴格限制下游結果。 主要部署的系統和設計機制集中於最可觀察和最易於管理的層級，而對用戶自主權影響最深遠的商業影響形式仍然缺乏理解，並缺乏檢測、測量或披露的框架。 中心挑戰是，生成系統中的商業影響是否可以變得值得信賴，即可歸因、可測量、可爭議，並與用戶福祉保持一致。
2605.18673.author: Jingyi Qiu et.al.
